assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions testing on dev clusters first and notes different notification schedules for prod clusters

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Includes Autopilot-specific section mentioning resource requirements, node auto-provisioning limitations, and notes limited rollback options

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Specifically includes 'kubectl api-resources' command to verify no deprecated APIs in use

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly includes 'Validate resource requests - Ensure pods meet Autopilot's resource requirements' in Autopilot-specific section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets, bare pods, or graceful shutdown configuration in the checklist

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl get nodes' command and mentions verifying cluster health and status

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health validation including application metrics, logs, storage, autoscaling, and health checks

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: First item in pre-upgrade checklist explicitly states 'Test on dev clusters first - Manually trigger 1.32 upgrade on your Rapid channel dev clusters'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention the GKE release schedule or the timing of advance notice beyond standard notifications
Comprehensive monitoring section including dashboards, alerts, log forwarding, and performance baseline validation

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response correctly avoids mentioning node-level maintenance exclusions, focusing on Autopilot-appropriate recommendations instead
